title: ziziphora pamiroalaica
intro: Ziziphora pamiroalaica, also known as Pamir ziziphora or Pamir dill, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ziziphora pamiroalaica include alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, have been extracted from the plant for medicinal use.
